stmt: ∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; ∃ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ¬ (g.1 ≐ □g.1)
priority_rationale: Strong existence statement separating Gödel and Henkin behavior directly.

stmt: ∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; ACR.Consistent α ∧ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ ∃ (x y : α), x ≐ ⊠x ∧ y ≐ ⊠y ∧ ¬ (x ≐ y)
priority_rationale: Strong consistent counterexample to uniqueness of reft-fixpoints, likely reusable widely.

stmt: ∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; ACR.Consistent α ∧ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ ∃ x : α, x ≤ □x ∧ ¬ (x ≐ ⊠x)
priority_rationale: Useful counterexample to the converse of thm_reft_fixedpoint_le_box_000022 under strong assumptions.

stmt: ∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; ACR.Consistent α ∧ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ ∃ h : ACR.HenkinFixpoint α, h.1 ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α) ∧ ¬ (h.1 ≤ ⊠h.1)
priority_rationale: Good separation result showing the C5 Henkin criterion is not automatic.

stmt: There exists a type α with instances [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] and an element x : α such that x ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α) holds, but x ≤ □x fails and x ≤ ⊠x fails.
priority_rationale: Sharpness witness for op_000033's extra hypothesis inside the C5 setting.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ((∃ x : α, x ≐ ⊠x ∧ x ≐ □x) ↔ (□(⊠(⊤ : α)) ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α)))
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ((□(⊠(⊤ : α)) ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α)) ↔ (⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ □(⊠(⊤ : α))))

∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; ACR.Consistent α ∧ ∃ g : α, g ≐ ⊠g ∧ (∀ x : α, x ≐ ⊠x → x ≐ g) ∧ ∃ h : α, h ≐ □h ∧ (∀ x : α, x ≐ □x → x ≐ h) ∧ ¬ (g ≐ h)

∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; ACR.Consistent α ∧ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α) ∧ ¬ (□(⊠(⊤ : α)) ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α))
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → (¬ (⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)) ↔ ∃ x : α, x ≐ ⊠x ∧ ¬ (x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)))
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → (⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)) → ((∃ x : α, x ≐ ⊠x ∧ x ≐ □x) ↔ □(⊠(⊤ : α)) ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α))
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → ⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≤ x
priority_rationale: Shallow corollary from reft-fixpoint bounds and anti-monotonicity.

stmt: There exists a four-element type α = {b, m, t, u} with preorder given by the reflexive-transitive closure of b ≤ m, b ≤ t, b ≤ u, m ≤ u, and t ≤ u, with distinguished elements ⊤ = t and ⊥ = b, with provability operator defined by □x = u for all x, and with reft operator defined by ⊠b = u, ⊠t = u, ⊠m = m, and ⊠u = b, such that α satisfies the ACR, Prov, Reft, and APS axioms, is consistent, has a Gödel fixpoint, and satisfies m ≐ ⊠m and ¬(m ≐ ⊠⊤).
priority_rationale: Concrete witness for a counterexample already given abstractly by thm_exists_consistent_fixpoint_not_reft_top_000018.

stmt: ∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; ACR.Consistent α ∧ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ ¬ (⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α))
priority_rationale: Already effectively implied by the existing consistent fixpoint-not-reft-top counterexample.

stmt: Let α = {b, p, t, r} with preorder generated by reflexivity together with p ≤ r and t ≤ r, with distinguished elements ⊤ = t and ⊥ = b, with provability operator defined by □x = r for every x, and with reft operator defined by ⊠b = t, ⊠t = r, ⊠p = p, and ⊠r = p. Then this structure satisfies the ACR, Prov, Reft, and APS axioms, and it is consistent.
priority_rationale: Mostly model verification for a specific witness, with little standalone reuse.

stmt: Let α = {b, p, t, r} with preorder generated by reflexivity together with p ≤ r and t ≤ r, with distinguished elements ⊤ = t and ⊥ = b, with provability operator defined by □x = r for every x, and with reft operator defined by ⊠b = t, ⊠t = r, ⊠p = p, and ⊠r = p. Then p ≐ ⊠p holds, Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) holds, and ¬ (⊠⊤ ≤ p) holds.
priority_rationale: Concrete instance of the abstract counterexample in thm_reft_fixedpoint_not_above_reft_top_000019.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] {x : α}, x ≤ □x → (x ≤ ⊠x ↔ x ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α))
priority_rationale: Looks like a short APS+C5 corollary rather than a new structural bridge.

stmt: ∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ ¬ (⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α))
priority_rationale: Essentially covered by the existing theorem giving a Gödel fixpoint not equivalent to reft-top.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → x ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α)
priority_rationale: Already a basic consequence of viewing x as a Gödel fixpoint.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → (x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α) ↔ ⊠(⊤ : α) ≤ x)
priority_rationale: Mostly a shallow reformulation once x ≤ ⊠⊤ is known for reft-fixpoints.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → ∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → ¬ (x ≤ ⊥)
priority_rationale: Direct corollary of thm_consistent_godel_irrefutable_000009.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] {x : α}, Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α) → x ≐ ⊠x
priority_rationale: Exactly the easy direction of thm_reft_fixedpoint_iff_reft_top_000005.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] {h : ACR.HenkinFixpoint α}, h.1 ≤ ⊠h.1 → h.1 ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α)
priority_rationale: Already follows from APS and is weaker than the derived C5 iff theorem.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ¬ (⊬ □(⊠(⊤ : α)))
priority_rationale: Combines existing Gödel-fixpoint and irrefutability theorems with little new content.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → □x ≐ □(⊠(⊤ : α))
priority_rationale: Once x ≐ ⊠⊤ holds, box-equivalence follows immediately by monotonicity.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, g.1 ≤ □g.1
priority_rationale: Immediate from thm_reft_fixedpoint_le_box_000022 or the GödelFixpoint definition.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] {x y : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → y ≐ ⊠y → (x ≤ y ↔ x ≐ y)
priority_rationale: Short anti-monotonicity corollary for comparable reft-fixpoints.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)
priority_rationale: Already refuted by thm_exists_consistent_fixpoint_not_reft_top_000018.
